name: rentorbit
description: Countrywide Kenyan rental marketplace for goods, services, and personnel.

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @rentorbit/shared && npm run dev --workspace @rentorbit/web
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @rentorbit/shared && npm run dev --workspace @rentorbit/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @rentorbit/shared && npm run start:dev --workspace @rentorbit/api
